name: Authority Current
description: Authority must exist, match scope, and remain unrevoked at commit.
fail_closed_condition: missing, stale, out-of-scope, or revoked authority

name: Evidence Fresh
description: Evidence basis must remain fresh inside the inference window.

name: Receipt Required
description: A reconstructable receipt must be available before continuation.

name: Reversibility Checked
description: The projected post-transition state must satisfy minimum recoverability.
